name: What if I talked to an insurance adjuster after using AI for my NY injury claim advice?
description: AI inconsistencies can kill credibility—lawyer up immediately.[1]

mainEntity.name: What if I talked to an insurance adjuster after using AI for my NY injury claim advice?

acceptedAnswer.text: AI inconsistencies can kill credibility—lawyer up immediately.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Your AI chats could contradict statements, weakening your case in discovery.[1] Adjusters probe for inconsistencies.[1] Key factors: discoverable AI logs; no privilege; potential bad-faith claim denial leverage.[1] Disclose AI use to your lawyer now; stick to facts in future talks; record all adjuster interactions.[1] Lawyer handles communications.
